skill.name: image-assistant
skill.description: Image Assistant - Convert articles and content into unified style, text-minimal, high-readability 16:9 infographic prompts
skill.summary: A structured 5-stage workflow that transforms content into ready-to-use image generation prompts with consistent visual style
skill.author: yunshu0909

security_audit.summary: This skill is a documentation-focused image prompt generator with an optional Python helper script for batch API calls. Static analysis flagged 118 patterns, but most are false positives from Markdown code examples and Chinese text entropy. The Python script legitimately accesses the APIMart image generation API using user-provided credentials. No malicious intent detected.

medium_findings.title: External API Dependency
medium_findings.description: The batch generation script makes HTTP requests to api.apimart.ai for image generation. Users must provide their own API token.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hardcoded API endpoint visible in config loading code - legitimate third-party service integration

low_findings.title: Markdown Code Examples Flagged as Shell Execution
low_findings.description: Static analyzer detected backtick syntax in documentation files as potential shell execution. These are Markdown code blocks showing usage examples, not executable code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Backticks are Markdown formatting for code blocks - the Python script is invoked normally via subprocess, not backtick execution

low_findings.title: Base64 Decoding for Image Data
low_findings.description: The script uses base64.b64decode to decode image data from API responses. This is legitimate image handling, not obfuscation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Base64 decode is used on API response image data - standard practice for handling base64-encoded images from image generation APIs

low_findings.title: High File Entropy False Positives
low_findings.description: Multiple Markdown files flagged for high entropy. This is caused by Chinese language content which has higher byte entropy than ASCII English.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Non-English text (Chinese) naturally produces higher entropy readings - not encrypted or binary content

content.user_title: Generate infographic prompts from your content
content.value_statement: Transform lengthy articles into visual-ready, text-minimal 16:9 infographic prompts. Follow a proven 5-stage workflow that ensures consistent style and clear messaging without overwhelming viewers.
actual_capabilities: Analyze content and determine optimal number of images needed
Plan image layout with clear purpose for each visual
Compress text into concise, high-readability copy specifications
Generate ready-to-use image generation prompts with consistent style
Support batch API calls to APIMart for automated image generation
Iterate on prompts based on user feedback for refinement
limitations: Requires user to provide their own APIMart API token for batch generation
Default output is 16:9 landscape format (vertical requires explicit request)
Script-based batch generation requires Python 3 environment
Does not generate images directly - produces prompts for external image models

use_cases.title: Content Creators Making Social Media Graphics
use_cases.description: Transform blog posts or article sections into scroll-stopping infographic prompts for social media. The workflow ensures each image communicates one clear message.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content marketers

use_cases.title: Educators Creating Visual Learning Materials
use_cases.description: Convert lesson content into consistent-style infographic prompts that students can easily scan and remember. Perfect for lecture slides or study guides.

use_cases.title: Product Teams Building Pitch Decks
use_cases.description: Turn product documentation into investor-ready visual prompts. The framework ensures complex concepts become clear, memorable visuals.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Content to Prompt
prompt_templates.prompt: I have this content that needs an infographic: [paste content]. It will be viewed on [mobile/PPT/poster] by [audience type]. I prefer [minimal text/information dense] style. Please create a 16:9 infographic prompt that captures the key message.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick single-image generation for simple content

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Image Article Breakdown
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this article and tell me: (1) how many images I need, (2) what each image should communicate, and (3) which layout template works best for each. Content: [paste article]. Primary use case: [mobile scrolling/PPT presentation].
prompt_templates.scenario: Breaking down long-form content into visual series

prompt_templates.title: Style-Consistent Prompt Pack
prompt_templates.prompt: I need [number] infographic prompts with consistent visual style. Theme: [topic]. Style requirements: cream paper background, colored pencil sketches, light watercolor, minimal text. Generate individual prompts for each image with the style block included.

prompt_templates.title: Batch API Request Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: I have [number] confirmed copy specifications ready for image generation. Create a JSONL batch request file for APIMart API with all prompts formatted correctly. Each image should use 2K resolution, 16:9 aspect ratio, gemini-3-pro-image-preview model.

output_examples.input: Transform this AI tool comparison into a visual: Decision Matrix vs Feature Checklist - when to use each approach
output_examples.output: Generated prompt for a 16:9 contrast infographic showing two cards side-by-side with cream paper texture, colored pencil icons, and clear Chinese typography comparing the two approaches

output_examples.input: Create a 5-step roadmap image for my course module on prompt engineering
output_examples.output: Generated prompt for a 16:9 cover/roadmap layout with 5 milestone markers, warm-toned watercolor backgrounds, and hand-drawn arrow connectors between stages

best_practices: Define your audience and viewing context before generating prompts - this determines text density and layout choices
Confirm the image清单 (list) before generating full prompts - ensures you create the right number of visuals
Use the style block consistently across all images in a series to maintain visual coherence
anti_patterns: Do not skip the requirements clarification stage - vague inputs produce generic outputs
Avoid cramming multiple concepts into a single image - one core message per visual
Do not modify the copy specification during prompt generation - this breaks content consistency

faq.question: Do I need to install anything to use this skill?
faq.answer: No installation required for basic prompt generation. The optional Python script for batch API calls requires Python 3 and your APIMart API token.

faq.question: Can I generate images in different aspect ratios?
faq.answer: Yes, but you must specify non-standard ratios explicitly. The default is 16:9 landscape for optimal readability.

faq.question: What image generation models are supported?
faq.answer: The default is gemini-3-pro-image-preview, but you can configure any model supported by APIMart in your local config file.

faq.question: How do I maintain consistent style across multiple images?
faq.answer: The skill includes a mandatory style block that gets inserted into every prompt, ensuring consistent paper texture, colored pencil aesthetic, and watercolor coloring.

faq.question: Can I use this with image generation tools other than APIMart?
faq.answer: Yes, the prompt templates are model-agnostic. The batch script is APIMart-specific, but generated prompts work with any text-to-image model.

faq.question: What if the generated images have too much text?
faq.answer: Use stage 5 (iteration) to provide feedback. The skill will reduce text density, adjust metaphors, and improve readability in the next version.
